---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Current Behavior
How does the plugin currently work (if applicable)?

## Desired Behavior
Describe how you'd like the feature to work or what the expected outcome should be.

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or examples that might help clarify the request.
